titleStmt.title: SII 28.30: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 30. (A.R. No. 30 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, on the south base of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Śrī-Vīrapratāpa-Dēvarāya Śaka 1305, Saumya Makara śu. Friday Pūraṭṭādi = 1429, A.D., December 30 (?).

summary.p: Ends of lines lost. From the details provided by the record, it can be understood that the king of the record was Śrī-Vīrapratāpa-Dēvarayamahārāya. This records the grant as sarvamāṉya of the several levies nañchey-puñchey-vāsal-mānai-pēr-kkaḍamai, tarikkaḍamai āṭṭai-kkāṇikkai, nāṭṭu-viniyōgam, paṭṭiṟai, pāḍāvari, āḷ-amañji, ariśi-kāṇam, nal-erudu, naṛpaśu, kōṇigai, vīrimuṭṭu and such other viniyōgam payable to the nāḍu and Vanniyavar, for the worship of God in and maintenance of the temple of Tirukkuraṇgāḍutuṟai-uḍaiyar kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyaṉār, by the nāṭṭār and tandrimār of Viṭṭa-ppaṟṟu among the eighteen paṟṟus to No. 25 above). The record was attested by Chōḻakōṉ-Kaṇḍiyadēvaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvaran hariharāya vi pāṭa n pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan muvarāyarakaṇṭan śrīvīravijayarāya kumāraśrīvīContinuation of lines lost.
ṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 5 saumya varuṣam makaranāyaṟṟu purvvapakṣattu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūraṭṭātiContinuation of lines lost.
rāciṅkavaḷanā ḷūr kūṟṟattu tirukkuraṅkāṭu tuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟuttaruḷiya ṉāyiṉāṟContinuation of lines lost.
ṟu kuṉṟappaṟṟu ṭṭārum tantarimārum Iṉṉāyinānā is Written below the line.r pūcai tiruppaṇikku tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇiyāna
ti cūtamaṅkalattil naṉcey puṉcey vācalmaṉai peṟkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamaikkum Āṭṭaik kāṇikkai nāṭṭu viṉiyokam paṭṭiṟai pāṭāvari Āḷ A
mañci Aricikāṇam nallerutu naṟpacu koṇikai virimuṭṭu maṟṟum nāṭṭai ṉokki varum palviṉivokaṅkaḷum vaṉṉiya variyum Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Iṉ
ṉāyiṉāṟku pūcai tiruppaṇikku caṟuvamāṉiyamāka nāṭākakuṭutta Aḷavukku Immariyāti candrādittavaraiyum cellat takkatākak kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom kuṟṟam
poṟuttaruḷiya nāyiṉāṟku patiṉeṭṭuppaṟṟil viṭṭapaṟṟu nāṭṭār tantarimārom Inta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyil kapilaippacuvaik
koṉṟavaṉ pukunta narakattil pukakkaṭavaṉākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṭṭukkaṇakku Irāciṅveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai coḻakoṉ kaṇṭiyatevaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
